name: gallery
description: Photo Gallery — browse and view the user's image collection
author: sapphire

settings.label: Gallery Root Path
settings.help: Root folder for your image collection. Subfolders become browseable albums.

settings.label: Preview Max Resolution
settings.help: Max pixel dimension (long edge) for single image previews

settings.label: ComfyUI Server URL
settings.help: URL of your ComfyUI server for image generation
